contributors.name: Rowan Hale
contributors.title: Snap Mortgage Editorial Contributor
contributors.shortBio: Rowan covers mortgage-rate context, inflation signals, and financing conditions so borrowers can compare payment scenarios with clearer timing.
contributors.bio: Rowan covers mortgage-rate context, inflation signals, and financing conditions for Snap Mortgage readers. This coverage helps borrowers understand why rate movement, APR, points, and payment assumptions can change the next mortgage comparison.

portrait.alt: Rowan Hale, Snap Mortgage editorial contributor

contributors.name: Maya Brooks
contributors.title: Snap Mortgage Editorial Contributor
contributors.shortBio: Maya covers city and state market conditions so borrowers can connect prices, inventory, taxes, and insurance to mortgage planning.
contributors.bio: Maya covers city and state market conditions for Snap Mortgage readers. This coverage helps borrowers compare local home values, inventory, taxes, insurance, and affordability before choosing a product path or next question.

portrait.alt: Maya Brooks, Snap Mortgage editorial contributor

contributors.name: Jordan Avery
contributors.title: Snap Mortgage Editorial Contributor
contributors.shortBio: Jordan covers buyer preparation, down payment choices, and offer-readiness topics that help borrowers compare purchase paths.
contributors.bio: Jordan covers buyer preparation, down payment choices, and purchase-readiness topics for Snap Mortgage readers. This coverage helps borrowers compare payment, cash-to-close, timing, and local-market questions before moving toward a reviewed scenario.

portrait.alt: Jordan Avery, Snap Mortgage editorial contributor

contributors.name: Elena Park
contributors.title: Snap Mortgage Editorial Contributor
contributors.shortBio: Elena covers refinance, cash-out, and home-equity decisions so homeowners can compare tradeoffs before changing a loan.
contributors.bio: Elena covers refinance, cash-out, and home-equity decisions for Snap Mortgage readers. This coverage helps homeowners compare payment changes, closing costs, breakeven timing, equity access, and term tradeoffs.

portrait.alt: Elena Park, Snap Mortgage editorial contributor

contributors.name: Marcus Lane
contributors.title: Snap Mortgage Editorial Contributor
contributors.shortBio: Marcus covers FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo, and other program comparisons that help borrowers understand fit and tradeoffs.
contributors.bio: Marcus covers mortgage program comparisons for Snap Mortgage readers. This coverage helps borrowers understand how FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo, and other loan paths differ by down payment, property, occupancy, and documentation questions.

portrait.alt: Marcus Lane, Snap Mortgage editorial contributor

contributors.name: Priya Bennett
contributors.title: Snap Mortgage Editorial Contributor
contributors.shortBio: Priya covers mortgage data, chart interpretation, and source methodology so borrowers can see what a metric can and cannot explain.
contributors.bio: Priya covers mortgage data, chart interpretation, and source methodology for Snap Mortgage readers. This coverage helps borrowers understand data dates, assumptions, affordability measures, and the limits of broad market indicators.

portrait.alt: Priya Bennett, Snap Mortgage editorial contributor
